name: KLine_Init5BaudEcuParams
title: KLine_Init5BaudEcuParams
syntax: long KLine_Init5BaudEcuParams(dword 5BaudAddress, dword rate_10thBd, dword W1_us, dword W2_us, dword W3_us, dword W4_us, dword W4Min_us, dword W4Max_us, dword addressNot);
description: Initialize K-Line channel for reception of the 5 baud pattern.
Must be called in on prestart handler after KLine_CreateECURepresentation.

parameters.name: 5BaudAddress
parameters.description: The 5 Baud address to accept on the active channel.

return: On success 0, otherwise a value less than 0.
